fields.name: Price List Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the unique identifier of the price list.

fields.name: Source Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of entity to which the price list is assigned. The options are relevant to the entity you are currently viewing.

fields.name: Source No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the entity to which the prices are assigned. The options depend on the selection in the Assign-to Type field. If you choose an entity, the price list will be used only for that entity.

fields.name: Parent Source No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the project to which the prices are assigned. If you choose an entity, the price list will be used only for that entity.

fields.name: Asset Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of the product.

fields.name: Asset No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the identifier of the product. If no product is selected, the price and discount values will apply to all products of the selected product type for which those values are not specified. For example, if you choose Item as the product type but do not specify a specific item, the price will apply to all items for which a price is not specified.

fields.name: Variant Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item variant.

fields.name: Currency Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the currency that is used for the prices on the price list. The currency can be the same for all prices on the price list, or you can specify a currency for individual lines.

fields.name: Work Type Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the work type code for the resource.

fields.name: Starting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date from which the price is valid.

fields.name: Ending Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the last date that the price is valid.

fields.name: Minimum Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the minimum quantity of the product.

fields.name: Unit of Measure Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the unit of measure for the product.

fields.name: Amount Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the price list line defines prices, discounts, or both.

fields.name: Unit Price
fields.tooltip: Specifies the price of one unit of the selected product.

fields.name: Cost Factor
fields.tooltip: Specifies the unit cost factor for project-related prices, if you have agreed with your customer that he should pay certain item usage by cost value plus a certain percent value to cover your overhead expenses.

fields.name: Unit Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the unit cost of the resource.

fields.name: Line Discount %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the line discount percentage for the product.

fields.name: Allow Line Disc.
fields.tooltip: Specifies if a line discount will be calculated when the price is offered.

fields.name: Allow Invoice Disc.
fields.tooltip: Specifies if an invoice discount will be calculated when the price is offered.

fields.name: Price Includes VAT
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the price includes VAT.

fields.name: VAT Bus. Posting Gr. (Price)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the default VAT business posting group code.

fields.name: Price Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the price type: sale or purchase price.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the product.

fields.name: Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the price list line is in Draft status and can be edited, Inactive and cannot be edited or used, or Active and used for price calculations.

fields.name: Direct Unit Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the direct unit cost of the product.

fields.name: Product No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the identifier of the product. If no product is selected, the price and discount values will apply to all products of the selected product type for which those values are not specified. For example, if you choose Item as the product type but do not specify a specific item, the price will apply to all items for which a price is not specified.

fields.name: Assign-to No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the entity to which the prices are assigned. The options depend on the selection in the Assign-to Type field. If you choose an entity, the price list will be used only for that entity.

fields.name: Assign-to Parent No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the project to which the prices are assigned. If you choose an entity, the price list will be used only for that entity.

fields.name: Variant Code Lookup
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item variant.

fields.name: Unit of Measure Code Lookup
fields.tooltip: Specifies the unit of measure for the product.
